calendar.matters:
Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Genuineness Of Documents And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar May-22-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LENESHA A JEFFERSON'S MOTION FOR ORDER DEEMING ADMITTED TRUTH OF FACTS AND GENUINENESS OF DOCUMENTS

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Lenesha Jefferson's unopposed motion to deem admitted the truth of any matters specified in Jefferson's Requests for Admission, served on February 27, 2026, is granted. Plaintiff Cavalry SPV I, LLC failed to respond and a deemed admitted order is mandatory. (See Ellson Decl, paras. 4-5 and Exs. A & B.) Code Civ. Proc., sec. 2033.280, subds. (b) and (c).) Jefferson did not seek sanctions, but sanctions are mandatory on this motion. (Id., subd. (c).) The court orders Cavalry to pay $100 to Jefferson within 30 days. Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Text Ruling
